---
title: "Yew (Taxus baccata)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

**Family:** [Taxaceae](/trees/family/taxaceae.html)

**Genus:** [*Taxus*](/trees/genus/taxus.html)

| Tree | Planted |
| --- | --- |
| [Tree 173 — Yew](../173.html) |  |
| [Tree 350 — Yew](../350.html) |  |
| [Tree 352 — Yew](../352.html) |  |
